prompt: We need to send our night-vision rifle scope (USML Category XII) to a UK distributor for a 6-month trade show circuit across Europe. What license do we need and how do we apply?

assertions.text: Correctly identifies DSP-73 as the appropriate temporary export license form
Confirms USML Category XII for night-vision/optical targeting equipment
Explains the D-Trade portal application process
Notes key conditions: items cannot be transferred to foreign ownership and must return by license expiry
Mentions that re-export from UK to other European countries during the show circuit may require DDTC approval
